whatItIs: A simple application that manages data storage, generates reports, and caches results. The system consists of three interdependent subsystems: a data store for persistent state, a reporting engine that analyzes stored data, and a cache manager that optimizes frequent queries. Maintained by a small platform team; this application is the entry point for data workflows.

machineryMap.name: DataStore
machineryMap.responsibility: Manages persistent data storage with fetch and save operations.

machineryMap.name: ReportGenerator
machineryMap.responsibility: Generates reports from stored data, depends on DataStore for data retrieval.

machineryMap.name: CacheManager
machineryMap.responsibility: Caches frequently accessed data with TTL-based invalidation to reduce latency.

invariants.statement: All cached values respect their TTL expiration time.
Data modifications through save() are immediately visible to fetch().

whyDecisions.decision: CacheManager uses a Map-based in-memory store rather than external cache (Redis, Memcached).
whyDecisions.rejectedAlternatives: External caches would add deployment complexity; in-memory is sufficient for this application's scale.
whyDecisions.sourceOrEvidence: src/cache.js#6-8; pragmatic choice for fixture scope
